entities.name: Idea Compounder
entities.context: Methodology for deep idea development through iterative refinement, contradiction detection, and devil's advocate testing

entities.name: Iteration Depth
entities.context: Quality standard requiring minimum 3 rounds before synthesis, typically 5-10 rounds, with no maximum

entities.name: Contradiction Detection
entities.context: Practice of identifying 3-5 contradictions per session, calling them out immediately and tracking resolution

entities.name: Counterexamples
entities.context: Testing mechanism targeting 3-5 edge cases of varying types (scale, context, extreme) to stress-test ideas

entities.name: Devil's Advocate
entities.context: Technique requiring strongest possible argument against an idea from competitor, skeptical customer, or investor perspectives

relationships.context: Enforces minimum iteration rounds before allowing synthesis
Core quality mechanism for identifying and resolving logical conflicts
Testing mechanism to reveal weaknesses through edge cases
Forces idea strengthening or pivot through strongest counter-arguments
Both serve to stress-test and reveal weaknesses in developing ideas
